# Wheel

**Wheel** provides a way to use Widgets, simple reusable chunks of JSON-like code, which can perform different actions. The Wheel comes with quite some built-in widgets, simply press <kbd>Z</kbd> to open the wheel and you'll be able to use them right away!

## Custom Widgets

Widgets are created within a resource pack, so if you ever want to break the boundaries of the built-in widgets, you can either download some new "widget packs", or even try creating your own!

> 🫂 Join the [Workshop](https://discord.gg/hQTVKUw2) to share your widgets, or download new ones!

> ⚙️ Take a look at the [GitHub](https://github.com/Manchick0/Wheel/tree/master) for a detailed guide on how to create a widget!
